headline: MeiraGTx Holdings PLC (MGTX) Reports Q1 Loss, Lags Revenue Estimates
summary: MeiraGTx (MGTX) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -32.56% and -81.10%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
